sehriDua.arabic: وَبِصَوْمِ غَدٍ نَّوَيْتُ مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ
sehriDua.transliteration: Wa bisawmi ghadin nawaytu min shahri Ramadan
sehriDua.translation: I intend to keep the fast for tomorrow in the month of Ramadan.

iftarDua.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي لَكَ صُمْتُ وَعَلَى رِزْقِكَ أَفْطَرْتُ
iftarDua.transliteration: Allahumma inni laka sumtu wa ala rizqika aftartu
iftarDua.translation: O Allah! I fasted for You and I break my fast with Your sustenance.

iftarDuaAlternate.arabic: ذَهَبَ الظَّمَأُ وَابْتَلَّتِ الْعُرُوقُ وَثَبَتَ الأَجْرُ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ
iftarDuaAlternate.transliteration: Dhahaba al-zama'u wa abtallatil-urooqu wa thabatal-ajru insha'Allah
iftarDuaAlternate.translation: The thirst has gone, the veins are moistened, and the reward is confirmed, if Allah wills.

ashras.name: Mercy
ashras.arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ وَارْحَمْ وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
ashras.translation: O my Lord! Forgive and have mercy, for You are the Best of those who show mercy.

ashras.name: Forgiveness
ashras.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ رَبِّي مِنْ كُلِّ ذَنْبٍ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
ashras.transliteration: Astaghfirullaha rabbi min kulli dhanbin wa atubu ilayh
ashras.translation: I seek forgiveness from Allah, my Lord, from every sin and I repent to Him.

ashras.name: Freedom from Fire
ashras.translation: O Allah, save me from the Hellfire.

laylatAlQadr.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ عَفُوٌّ تُحِبُّ الْعَفْوَ فَاعْفُ عَنِّي
laylatAlQadr.translation: O Allah, You are the Most Forgiving, and You love forgiveness, so forgive me.

laylatAlQadr.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
laylatAlQadr.transliteration: Rabbana atina fid-dunya hasanatan wa fil-akhirati hasanatan wa qina 'adhaban-naar
laylatAlQadr.translation: Our Lord, give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and save us from the punishment of the Fire.

excusedDays.title: Dua for Ease
excusedDays.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لاَ سَهْلَ إِلاَّ مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلاً وَأَنْتَ تَجْعَلُ الْحَزْنَ إِذَا شِئْتَ سَهْلاً
excusedDays.transliteration: Allahumma la sahla illa ma ja'altahu sahlan, wa anta taj'alul-hazna idha shi'ta sahla
excusedDays.translation: O Allah, there is no ease except in that which You have made easy. If You wish, You make difficulty easy.

excusedDays.title: Dua for Patience
excusedDays.arabic: رَبَّنَا أَفْرِغْ عَلَيْنَا صَبْرًا وَثَبِّتْ أَقْدَامَنَا
excusedDays.transliteration: Rabbana afrigh 'alayna sabran wa thabbit aqdamana
excusedDays.translation: Our Lord, pour upon us patience and plant firmly our feet.

excusedDays.title: Dua for Comfort
excusedDays.arabic: حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ ۖ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
excusedDays.transliteration: Hasbiyal-lahu la ilaha illa huwa, 'alayhi tawakkaltu, wa huwa Rabbul-'Arshil-'Azeem
excusedDays.translation: Allah is sufficient for me. There is no deity except Him. Upon Him I have relied, and He is the Lord of the Great Throne.

excusedDays.title: Dua for Healing
excusedDays.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ النَّاسِ أَذْهِبِ الْبَاسَ اشْفِهِ وَأَنْتَ الشَّافِي لَا شِفَاءَ إِلَّا شِفَاؤُكَ شِفَاءً لَا يُغَادِرُ سَقَمًا
excusedDays.transliteration: Allahumma Rabban-naas, adhhibil-ba's, ishfihi wa antash-Shaafi, la shifa'a illa shifa'uka, shifa'an la yughadiru saqama
excusedDays.translation: O Allah, Lord of mankind, remove the affliction. Cure him, for You are the One who cures. There is no cure except Your cure — a cure that leaves no illness behind.
